rule_text: AP Accountant-General will EXAMINE contracts as part of audit and REPORT to the Government any case where: (a) competitive tenders were not invited though they should have been under the rules, OR (b) a tender other than the lowest was accepted without sufficient justification, OR (c) any other material irregularity was committed in connection with a contract.
verification_method: Tender file must withstand AG audit on these three grounds — competitive tender invited (or exception documented), L1 acceptance (or recorded reasons), no material irregularity

rule_text: Form 9 of AP Financial Code is the GENERAL TENDER + AGREEMENT FORM for AP stores procurement; this form shall be used for every invitation to tender where no other special form has been duly prescribed.
verification_method: Check tender uses Form 9 unless special form is prescribed; reject ad-hoc tender forms

rule_text: For AP stores procured under F.O.R. (free on rail) contracts: consignees are responsible for verifying loss/damage at delivery, securing Railway certificates if needed, intimating supplier + purchasing officer + Accounts Officer promptly, and preferring formal claim against carrying Railway; Accounts Officer deducts appropriate sum from contractor's outstanding/future bill on damage intimation.
verification_method: Check tender SCC includes F.O.R. damage-handling protocol with consignee/Accounts-Officer/purchasing-officer responsibilities
